name: Fiery Chili Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 cup hot chili peppers, roasted and chopped
3/4 cup red bell pepper, roasted and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large pot.
2. Cook over medium heat for 1 to 1 1/2 hours, stirring occasionally.
3. When the mixture has thickened enough for you [it will thicken as it cools], ladle into pint jars.
4. Process the jars in a boiling water bath for 15 minutes.
